---
title: "News"
listing:
  - id: news-feed
    contents:
      - "**/index.qmd"
      - "!index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
page-layout: full
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

Recent updates, talks, presentations, and workshop announcements.

:::{#news-feed}
:::
